channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Mourners fill Tehran streets for Ayatollah Khamenei's funeral, chant against Trump
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Mourners flood Iran capital for Khamenei funeral procession
- Roundup: Huge crowds attend funeral procession of Iran's late leader in Tehran
- Mourners Throng Funeral Procession In Tehran For Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
- Mourners flood Iran capital for Khamenei funeral procession
- Millions join funeral procession for Iran's Khamenei in Tehran
- Huge crowds fill Tehran streets for Khamenei's funeral procession
- Huge crowd joins funeral procession for Iran’s Supreme Leader Khamenei
- Mourners throng funeral procession in Tehran for Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
- Khamenei’s funeral draws mourners from across Iran’s regional network.
- Iran Live Updates: Crowds Gather in Tehran for Ayatollah’s Funeral Procession
- Huge crowd joins funeral procession for Iran’s Supreme Leader Khamenei
- Ayatollah Ali Khamenei funeral: Mourners throng procession in Tehran
- Huge crowds fill Tehran streets for Khamenei's funeral procession
- Khamenei’s funeral draws mourners from across Iran’s regional network.
- Red-white flags, packed roads: Millions throng Iran streets for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's funeral | Videos
- Iran begins a procession through Tehran for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s funeral
- Iran: Millions flock to Ali Khamenei's funeral procession
- Funeral procession for Iran’s slain Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei under way
- Khamenei’s funeral procession moves through Tehran
- Crowds of mourners gather in Tehran for Khamenei funeral procession
- Millions attend funeral procession for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
- Millions join funeral procession for Iran’s supreme leader Ali Khamenei
- Millions walk with Ali Khamenei's coffin in Tehran funeral procession – video
- Iran begins massive funeral procession for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in Tehran
- Iran: Millions flock to Ali Khamenei's funeral procession
- Huge crowds in attendance as funeral procession for Iran's slain supreme leader begins
- Iran begins a procession through Tehran for Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's funeral
- Huge crowds expected at Iran late leader's funeral procession]]>

- Riot in Sri Lanka’s Negombo prison leaves at least 23 dead
- At least 19 killed and more than 100 wounded in Sri Lanka prison riot, officials say
- Sri Lanka prison riots leave 26 dead and more than 100 injured
- Sri Lanka prison riot kills 26, wounds more than 100
- 25 dead, 100 injured in clashes at Sri Lanka prison, sources say
- Sri Lanka prison riot kills 26, wounds more than 100
- Sri Lanka prison riots leave 26 dead and more than 100 injured

- 25 killed, 100 injured in clashes between two groups at prison in Sri Lanka
- Riot in Sri Lanka’s Negombo prison leaves at least 23 dead
- Clashes in Sri Lanka prison leave at least 25 dead
- Sri Lanka prison clashes leave dozens dead
- Inmates and guards killed in deadly fighting at Sri Lanka prison
- At least 20 people killed in Sri Lanka prison clashes
- 25 killed, about 100 injured in unrest at Sri Lankan prison
- Twenty-five dead, 100 injured in clashes at Sri Lanka prison, sources say - Reuters
- At least 19 killed and more than 100 wounded in Sri Lanka prison riot, officials say
- Twenty-five dead, 100 injured in clashes at Sri Lanka prison, sources say
- 23 killed, more than 100 injured in gang clashes at Sri Lanka prison
- Sri Lanka prison riot kills 25, wounds more than 100
- Deadly clashes break out at prison in Sri Lanka
- Deadly clashes break out at prison in Sri Lanka]]>

- Hamas dissolves its government in Gaza to transfer power to UN-backed committee

- Hamas dissolves Gaza governing body
